required_variables.name: GOOGLE_SHEET_ID
required_variables.description: The ID from your Google Sheets URL: docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/<THIS_PART>/edit

_setup_instructions.schedule: Runs automatically at 8:00 AM CT every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday. Uses a 4-week rolling calendar anchored to 2025-01-06.
_setup_instructions.activation: Set workflow active = true in n8n after configuring credentials and variables.
